description_long: This object is a standard Western-style toilet with a rounded bowl and an attached water cistern at the back. The toilet features a hinged seat and lid, both of which are raised in the images, revealing the smooth, glazed ceramic bowl beneath. The cistern is rectangular and sits directly above the bowl, with a visible flush lever on the left side. Plumbing connections and a flush pipe are visible at the rear and base, indicating typical installation for indoor or public restroom use. The surface is predominantly white with a glossy finish, giving it a clean and hygienic appearance. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for high-traffic urban environments.
description: A white, glossy, floor-mounted toilet with a rounded bowl, raised seat, and exposed cistern with a visible flush lever.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open seat, bowl interior, and the cistern with the lid and flush lever visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bowl, the raised seat, and the flush lever on the cistern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cistern, plumbing connections, and the flush pipe.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cistern, bowl, and additional plumbing details at the base.
